name: Blueberry-Apple Muffies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Add the egg, buttermilk, melted butter, and minced apple to the dry mixture. Stir until just combined, discarding any small lumps.
4. Gently fold in the blueberries. If using frozen blueberries, proceed with baking immediately. Otherwise, chill the batter airtight for at least 2 hours or overnight.
5. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Drop spoonfuls of chilled batter onto greased baking sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart. Optionally, sprinkle additional cereal on top.
7. Bake in the center of the preheated oven for 7-8 minutes, rotating pans if browning is irregular. Ensure the muffins are not overbaked.
8. Cool the muffins on wire racks.
Makes 20 (3-inch) muffins.
